title: Map Maker's Modpack
description: A modpack for mapmakers that includes popular command, datapack and builder focused mods.
body:
A modpack for map creators, incorperating popular command, datapack and builder focused mods. It will be updated regularly to ensure it works on the latest version of Minecraft. Highlights of this project are:

- **Better Highlighting** provides improved syntax highlighting for commands
- **Visible Entities** shows you mobs that are normally only visible in spectator, the bounding box of interactions and invisible item frames
- **Better Command Block UI** provides a more usable Command Block UI
- **Component Viewer** allows you to view and copy components of any item stack
- **Visible Barriers** makes barriers and other invisible blocks visible
- **Better Suggestions** provides more/better suggestions for Minecraft commands
- This pack also uses **[VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)** for block variety and texture fixes
- **Axiom** is a client-side world editing studio, perfect for building
